summary: Iteration 35: Comprehensive testing of billing/payment failure flow improvements. Backend APIs for GET /api/billing/subscription (new payment_issue shape) and GET /api/billing/history (regression) all pass. Frontend billing settings page loads correctly without crash. BillingPaymentIssueBanner component code review verified - data-testids present. Webhook handler code reviewed for invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted flows.
passed_tests: GET /api/billing/subscription - 200 OK
GET /api/billing/subscription - payment_issue object present

GET /api/billing/subscription - payment_issue has all required fields (has_issue, severity, title, message, cta_label, grace_period_until, last_failed_at, last_failed_amount, last_failed_amount_label, invoice_hosted_url, invoice_pdf_url)
GET /api/billing/subscription - payment_issue.has_issue is boolean
GET /api/billing/subscription - payment_issue.severity has valid values (null, warning, critical)
GET /api/billing/subscription - core fields present (tenant_id, plan, interval, status, portal_available, can_cancel, can_change_plan)
GET /api/billing/subscription - plan has valid values (trial, starter, pro, enterprise)
GET /api/billing/subscription - interval has valid values (monthly, yearly)
GET /api/billing/subscription - returns 401 for unauthenticated
GET /api/billing/history - 200 OK
GET /api/billing/history - returns items array
GET /api/billing/history - items have required structure (id, title, description, occurred_at, actor_label, actor_type, tone)
GET /api/billing/history?limit=5 - limit parameter works
GET /api/billing/history - returns 401 for unauthenticated
Code review: billing_webhooks.py router exists
Code review: stripe_checkout_service has mark_invoice_paid, mark_payment_failed, mark_subscription_canceled, get_billing_overview methods
Code review: mark_invoice_paid signature accepts tenant_id, subscription_id, amount_paid, paid_at
Code review: mark_payment_failed signature accepts tenant_id, subscription_id, amount_due, invoice_hosted_url, invoice_pdf_url, failed_at
Code review: mark_subscription_canceled signature accepts tenant_id, subscription_id, canceled_at
Frontend: /app/settings/billing loads without crash
Frontend: Billing page title 'Faturalama' displayed
Frontend: Billing summary cards (plan, renewal date, status) displayed
Frontend: Billing management card present with buttons (Update Payment Method, Cancel Subscription, Refresh)
Frontend: Billing plan change card present with cycle tabs (Aylık/Yıllık)
Frontend: Billing history timeline card present with title 'Faturalama Geçmişi'
Frontend: Billing history shows events with proper formatting (date, actor, tone colors)
Frontend: Yearly tab toggle works - shows yearly prices with '2 ay ücretsiz' badge
Frontend: BillingPaymentIssueBanner not visible when no payment issue (correct behavior)
Frontend: BillingPaymentIssueBanner has correct data-testid attributes in code
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: get_billing_overview returns comprehensive payment_issue object with all fields: has_issue, severity, title, message, cta_label, grace_period_until, last_failed_at, last_failed_amount, last_failed_amount_label, invoice_hosted_url, invoice_pdf_url

SUCCESS: mark_invoice_paid clears payment failure state ($unset: grace_period_until, last_payment_failed_at, last_payment_failed_amount, invoice_hosted_url, invoice_pdf_url) and sets last_invoice_paid_at
SUCCESS: mark_payment_failed sets status='past_due', grace_period_until, last_payment_failed_at, last_payment_failed_amount, invoice_hosted_url, invoice_pdf_url
SUCCESS: mark_subscription_canceled sets status='canceled' and clears all scheduled/failure state
SUCCESS: billing_webhooks.py handlers correctly call service methods with proper parameters
SUCCESS: BillingPaymentIssueBanner.jsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
SUCCESS: SettingsBillingPage.jsx properly passes paymentIssue prop to BillingPaymentIssueBanner
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing payment failure flow is complete. The payment_issue object in GET /api/billing/subscription has 11 fields to support detailed UI banner display. When has_issue=true, severity can be 'warning' (past_due, incomplete) or 'critical' (unpaid, incomplete_expired). The BillingPaymentIssueBanner shows amount, last failure date, grace period end date, and provides direct links to invoice. Webhook handlers in both /api/webhook/stripe-billing and main /api/webhook/stripe properly update timeline and payment issue state.

feature_validation_summary.GET /api/billing/subscription payment_is: PASS - All 11 fields present with correct types
feature_validation_summary.GET /api/billing/history: PASS - Regression test passed, items array with timeline events
feature_validation_summary.Billing settings page /app/settings/bill: PASS - Loads without crash, all sections visible
feature_validation_summary.BillingPaymentIssueBanner render: NO-REGRESSION - Component not visible (no payment issue), code review confirms correct implementation
feature_validation_summary.Webhook handler code review: PASS - invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted all properly implemented
